context: Agent identifies all deprecated Terragrunt syntax across a Makefile and two HCL files and provides correct 0.93+ replacements.

checklist.name: run-all → run --all migration identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies all three 'run-all' usages in the Makefile as deprecated and provides the 'run --all' replacement commands.

checklist.name: TERRAGRUNT_LOG_LEVEL → TG_LOG migration identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies TERRAGRUNT_LOG_LEVEL as a deprecated environment variable and states TG_LOG=debug (or --terragrunt-log-level → --log-level) as the replacement.

checklist.name: retryable_errors → errors block migration identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies retryable_errors as deprecated and provides an equivalent errors { retry { ... } } block as the 0.93+ replacement.

checklist.name: skip → exclude block migration identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies 'skip = true' as deprecated and provides an equivalent 'exclude { if = true; actions = ["all"] }' block.

checklist.name: Behaviour differences explained
checklist.description: Agent explains at least one behaviour difference, such as the exclude block supporting fine-grained action targeting (e.g., only blocking destroy) rather than the binary skip flag.
